prevalence.source: National surveys on substance use + IHME GBD context
prevalence.trend: stable to increasing in some regions

burden.mortalityRate: Low; indirect via accidents and mental health comorbidity

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: DSM-5/ICD-11 criteria; assess impairment and withdrawal; screen for comorbid mental illness

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Low due to treatment gaps and limited counseling services

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Often identified in de-addiction centers and tertiary psychiatry
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Psychosocial treatment (CBT/motivational); harm reduction; comorbidity management
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Stigma and limited specialized psychotherapy access
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Growing de-addiction services and tele-mental health capacity in some states
